events.text: Jakub Kiwior (Poland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Matty Cash (Poland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Arkadiusz Milik (Poland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Abdulelah Al Malki (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Poland 1, Saudi Arabia 0. Piotr Zielinski (Poland) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Robert Lewandowski.
Penalty saved! Salem Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) fails to capitalise on this great opportunity,  right footed shot saved  in the bottom left corner.
Abdulelah Al Amri (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Poland 2, Saudi Arabia 0. Robert Lewandowski (Poland) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
